description: Vertical feature slice: guests book available listings for date ranges, view their bookings, and cancel bookings. Double-booking is prevented via atomic conflict detection. Booking status transitions: CONFIRMED → CANCELLED. This slice assumes JWT authentication and listing management are already in place.
functional_requirements: As a guest, I can book a listing for a specific check-in and check-out date range; conflicting bookings on those dates return 409
As a guest, I can view all my current and past bookings
As a guest, I can cancel a booking I made; the booking status changes to CANCELLED
Another user attempting to cancel my booking receives a 403 Forbidden error
non_functional_requirements: All booking endpoints require JWT authentication with GUEST role
Booking creation must prevent double-booking via atomic check-and-insert (no race conditions)
Booking status follows the transition: CONFIRMED → CANCELLED only
